annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under N.D.C.C. § 28-20-34, currently 10% (as of January 1, 2026). , reset annually. Rate = (U.S. prime rate as published/reported in the Wall Street Journal on the first Monday in December of the prior year) + 3 percentage points, then… Simple interest. Contract rate governs first — if the original instrument on which the action was based specifies an interest rate, judgment interest accrues at THAT… Verify the current value at ndcourts.gov; not legal advice.
